# PR Template

**Author AI:** <Taya | Sarah>
**Triggered by:** <Frost | Jet | scheduled | reactive>

## What changed
<short description>

## Why
<motivation — what business need does this serve>

## Scope
- [ ] Shared (both AIs need this)
- [ ] Mostly mine (low impact on other AI's work)

## Reviewer AI checklist
- [ ] Doesn't leak private context (no Frost-vault / Jet-vault content in shared repo)
- [ ] Doesn't violate Notion ownership rules
- [ ] Doesn't conflict with an active claim
- [ ] Commit messages have correct co-author trailer
- [ ] If this changes rules-of-engagement, both humans approved
